falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 drops by more than 5% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp decline would contradict the historical bottom pattern (which typically precedes a rally), invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases above 70 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 70 indicates extreme market stress, diverging from the historical bottom's low-stress context and invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match percentage to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant drop in pattern similarity would indicate the current market dynamics are no longer aligned with the historical reference, falsifying the basis for the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
